title: Headset connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Headset connection status (green/red indicator) is not accurately reflected across Cloud pages (Device Users, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile) when headset is powered on/off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure the headset is powered ON and connected to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the headset connection status indicator shows a green icon.
4. Log in to the Cloud portal and navigate to the Device Users page.
5. Verify that the headset's connection status shows a green indicator for the ON state.
6. Navigate to the Inventory page on the Cloud portal.
7. Verify that the headset's connection status shows a green indicator for the ON state.
8. Navigate to the Mobile profile page on the Cloud portal.
9. Verify that the headset's connection status shows a green indicator for the ON state.
10. Navigate to the Device profile page on the Cloud portal.
11. Verify that the headset's connection status shows a green indicator for the ON state.
12. Power OFF the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
13. On the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen, verify the headset connection status indicator changes to a red icon.
14. Return to the Cloud portal Device Users page and verify the status indicator changes to red.
15. Navigate to the Inventory page on the Cloud portal and verify the status indicator is red.
16. Navigate to the Mobile profile page on the Cloud portal and verify the status indicator is red.
17. Navigate to the Device profile page on the Cloud portal and verify the status indicator is red.
expected: When the headset is turned ON, a green status indicator is displayed consistently across the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen, Cloud Device Users page, Inventory page, Mobile profile page, and Device profile page. When the headset is turned OFF, a red status indicator is displayed consistently across all the same pages.
